title: Rearrange My Work Tasks
excerpt: Monday should allow us to rearrange My Work tasks by dragging tasks to the top. It’ll be much easier for our teams to know their priority tasks.

posts.author: robert_gtc (robert hall)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday should allow us to rearrange My Work tasks by dragging tasks to the top. It’ll be much easier for our teams to know their priority tasks.

posts.author: susieemendez (Susana Hatfield)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, or include the priority column so we can sort by that!
